title: Decked Out Vanilla+
description: performance mods, splitscreen and controller support, more things to explore, and made to run on the Steam Deck, and PC
body:
Decked Out Vanilla+ Is a modpack made with SteamDecks, PCs, and Controller/splitscreen support in mind. Adding new armor, tools, and structures. Making progression feel much smoother when upgrading or sidegrading. 

This modpack is great for people coming from bedrock who want more content or people who are tired of playing java and playing with the same content every time they start a 2 week phase who are dying for an end update.

Quartz tools and armor can serve as good options for experienced players who try to get to the nether as soon as possible but still want a bit of protection if they can't find a good amount of iron.

Copper tools and armor serve as an extra set a bit below iron that come in handy if you don't have enough iron for a full set or to free up more iron to use for things like shields and shears.

Amethyst armor and tools are comparable to iron but in pure forms provide a slow healing aura.

Emerald armor and tools are also the same as iron but have a form to upgrade to from netherite with small buffs compared to the

Enderite armor and tools which are upgraded to from netherite but provide +1 stat buff to all pieces of gear and allow for some tools to be charged with ender pearls for special abilities.

Many new structures have been added to make exploration more fun.

Many performance mods have also been added to make the game run much smoother on lower end hardware (like steamdecks) or running multiple instances at once during splitscreen.
